query:
SELECT
            u.name AS recipient_name,
            u.phone AS recipient_phone,
            da.nova_poshta_city,
            da.nova_poshta_number
        FROM assignments a
        JOIN users u ON u.id = a.recipient_id
        JOIN delivery_addresses da ON da.user_id = a.recipient_id
        WHERE a.sender_id = $1 AND a.season_id = $2
